description: Los Choneros is an Ecuadorian organized crime group originating from Chone, Manabí, with headquarters in Guayaquil. Founded around 2005 by Jorge Bismark Véliz España, it engages in drug trafficking, extortion, murder, and other crimes. The group has alliances with the Sinaloa Cartel, Albanian mafia, 'Ndrangheta, and Cosa Nostra, and controls drug routes from South America to Europe. It is currently active with over 10,000 members.

country_links.context: The organization partners with the Albanian mafia.

country_links.evidence_quote: tienen una sociedad en el Atlántico sudamericano con el Primer comando capital de Brasil
country_links.context: The organization has a partnership with a Brazilian criminal group in the South Atlantic.

country_links.evidence_quote: presuntamente asesinado en Colombia en mayo del 2023
country_links.context: A leader of a faction was allegedly killed in Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: la 'Ndrangheta italiana y la Cosa nostra
country_links.context: The organization partners with Italian mafia groups.

country_links.evidence_quote: son socios en el envío de cocaína con los carteles mexicanos especialmente el Cártel de Sinaloa
country_links.context: The organization partners with Mexican cartels to send cocaine.
